value.found_quote:
Set up tracing
Learn how to enable Cloud Trace on your agent and view traces to analyze query response times and executed operations.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "Set up tracing" guide under the "Monitor agents" section, which states it enables Cloud Trace on agents to view traces and analyze query response times and executed operations — matching the claim verbatim. The page also notes at the top that this feature is in "Preview" and subject to Pre-GA Offerings Terms.
